purpose: Define what a remote or local MindShare install downloads as global system context, role package context, and agent/runtime context.

notes: Do not include secrets, local auth files, transient state, or machine-specific caches in downloadable packages.
Global files establish governance and shared operating context.
Role files establish a named role's voice, boundaries, workflow, memory, and autonomy contract.
Agent files establish executable/runtime behavior for a role that has entered the Agent Path or local autonomous operation.

global.description: Shared MindShare system context required before any role or agent package is installed.

required_files.reason: Repo-level operating instructions, role routing, conference-room rules, and source boundaries.
Shared culture and behavior context for role voice and collaboration.
Project control artifact and persistent memory contract.
Global install, skill, repo, and tool catalogs.
Shared role, agent, workflow, memory, deployment, evaluation, and MAPS templates.
Repo-local MAPS and role skills required by the operating model.
Shared validator for MAPS skill contracts.
Canonical roster, reporting structure, and org-wide role/status context.

optional_files.reason: Local graph-memory injection status when available.

excluded_files.reason: Git metadata is not part of an install package.
Domain-specific working area, not global role/agent substrate unless explicitly requested.
Website design artifacts; not required for local autonomous operation.
Website/demo surface; include only in the optional web bundle.

role.description: A role package is the human-readable role office and operating contract. It can power conversation mode and is required before local autonomous operation.

required_files.reason: Primary role contract, scope, authority, and responsibilities.
Canonical autonomy level, Level 4/5/6 capability definitions, boundaries, and revocation.

conditional_files.condition: Required for roles with office/session injection or Cole validation.
conditional_files.reason: Injected role card and autonomy context.

conditional_files.condition: Required when the role has a dedicated personality file.
Required when the role has explicit gate exceptions or denied actions.
Required when the role tracks current state outside memory.
Required when the role has automation behavior documented.
Required when a G Drive room card exists for the role.
Required when Drive mirrors are part of the install target.

excluded_files.reason: Historical local memory archive; include only for owner-approved migration.
Runtime state belongs in the agent/runtime package, not the base role package.
Runtime proof belongs in the agent/runtime package, not the base role package.

agent.description: An agent package is the executable/local runtime layer for a role that performs autonomous or automated work on the user's machine.

required_files.reason: Client-side shell that exposes local CLI capabilities to the website/app without putting local-machine access in the web page.
Shared agent runtime validators, source loaders, and gates.
Runtime must read current authorized autonomy level and active capability boundaries.

conditional_files.condition: Required when the role has entered the Agent Path.
Required for MAPS Define/Design/Build agent packages.
Required when the agent has a design artifact.
Required when latest eval evidence should migrate.
Required when role is Level 4 and script-backed.
Required when role is Level 4 and uses per-role scripts folder standard.
Required when role is Level 5 and script-backed.
Include only when migrating an existing active local agent instance.
Include only when migrating an existing active local agent instance.
Template only; target machine must create its own automation record.

excluded_files.reason: Local auth belongs only to the target user's machine.
Session history is not portable agent source.
Local logs are not portable source.
Runtime state should be regenerated or migrated through an explicit migration path.

web_demo.description: Optional public website/demo surface. This is not required for local autonomous operation.

validation_checks.check: Package must not include .env.local, auth.json, session logs, local sqlite logs, or machine-specific caches.
A roles.md source or exported roster snapshot must be present.
Each installed role must include Autonomy.md.
Each installed role must define authority boundaries through role-agent.md, Autonomy.md, or gate-blocks.md.
Target machine must authenticate Codex/Claude locally; downloaded package must not provide credentials.
Web page must communicate through the local client contract, not direct local filesystem or hardcoded 127.0.0.1 access.

open_questions: Should roles.md be packaged from G Drive directly, exported into the repo, or generated as a sanitized roster snapshot?
Should active state/proof migrate when installing an agent, or should target machines always start with fresh state/proof?
Should public conversation mode use the role package only, or a separate sanitized conversation package?
Should legacy agents/{agent_slug}/ files remain part of the Agent Path or be folded into roles/{role_slug}/ agent metadata?
